scripts.docker:fresh: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env down -v && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env build --no-cache && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env up && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env run --rm minio-init
scripts.docker:build: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env down && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env build --no-cache && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env up && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env run --rm minio-init
scripts.docker:backend: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env build api && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env up -d postgres redis minio api && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env run --rm minio-init
scripts.docker:backend_up: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env up -d postgres redis minio api && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env run --rm minio-init
scripts.frontend: turbo run build --filter=frontend && turbo run dev --filter=frontend
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate dev
